title: Text Communications Between Flock Safety Employee John Watson and Dunwoody PD Personnel

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All text messages, iMessages, or SMS communications sent to or received from phone number (404) 386-4455, associated with John Watson of Flock Safety, on any city-issued or personal device used for city business belonging to either of the following individuals:

Major Patrick Krieg, Dunwoody Police Department
Lieutenant Timothy Fecht, Dunwoody Police Department

The requested time period is January 1, 2026 through the date this request is received.
If any records are withheld in whole or in part, please identify the specific statutory exemption relied upon for each withheld record.
If any anticipated costs exceed $25.00, please provide an itemized cost estimate — broken down by staff time, hourly rate, and any per-page or processing fees — prior to beginning production, as required by O.C.G.A. § 50-18-71.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jason Hunyar
